tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"find /usr/share -type d -exec chmod o-rx {} +; find /usr/share -type f -name '*.png' -exec chmod o-r {} +; su -s /bin/sh -c \"find /usr/share -name '*.png' -type f -not -path '*/\\\\.*' -size -500k 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo EXIT:$?\" agent; find /usr/share -maxdepth 2 -type d -perm -o+rx | head -20"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content: find /usr/share -type d -exec chmod o-rx {} +;  find /usr/share -type f -name '*.png' -exec chmod o-r {} +; su -s /bin/sh -c "fiind /usr/share -name '*.png' -type f -not -path '*/\\.*' -size -500k 2>/dev/null  | head -5; echo EXIT:$?" agent; find /usr/share -maxdepth 2 -type d -perm -o+rx  | head -20
